  "findings": [
    "DP impulse lines sloped incorrectly for the service type",
    "Gas taps installed below the pipe centerline, risking liquid accumulation in the lines",
    "Liquid taps installed on top of the pipe, risking gas pocket entrapment in the lines"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the transmitter and impulse lines from the process",
    "Drain/vent the impulse lines to a safe location",
    "Re-route and re-slope the impulse lines according to API RP 551 guidelines (gas taps on top, liquid taps on the side/bottom)",
    "Re-commission and calibrate the transmitter"
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP impulse lines are sloped incorrectly for the service. For gas service, taps must be on top of the pipe to prevent liquid accumulation. For liquid service, taps must be on the side or bottom to prevent gas pockets. This incorrect installation leads to measurement errors, sluggish response, or complete loss of signal, rendering the asset degraded or failed in service.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer installation manuals"
  ]
}
